item.name: Marine Matanga
item.description:
Proof that anything looks friendlier when it has Matanga features, even sharks.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: With its large eyes, grey body, and long nose, it is not hard to see why this shark is considered the Matanga of the sea. A folktale claims that it is the reincarnated form of a Matanga high priest who had spent years in solemn meditation.
